achievements.description: Complete the cabin segment

achievements.description: Defeat both El Gigante and the Chainsaw Sisters before reaching the castle in Chapter 2-3 (No NG+)

achievements.title: The Knife Master
achievements.description: In a single session, complete the Village campaign using only the knife with no weapon equipped at the start of the game (No NG+, Weapon is allowed at the path to the cave to complete all 3 boxes puzzle, unequip it again before opening the waterfall

achievements.description: Complete the Village campaign

achievements.description: Jump out of every window in the Village campaign

achievements.description: Kill at least 300 enemies during the Village campaign (No NG+)

achievements.description: Defeat El Gigante without taking damage and without using special weapons (No NG+)

achievements.description: Defeat Bitores Mendez without taking damage and without using special weapons (No NG+)

achievements.description: Defeat Salazar

achievements.description: Successfully crash the bulldozer
